title: Sam Altman admits rushing the controversial DoW AI deal was a sloppy mistake, clarifies new changes
description: Sam Altman has updated the controversial DoW AI agreement to strictly ban domestic surveillance and tracking. He admitted that rushing the announcement was a mistake and confirmed intelligence agencies like the NSA are excluded from using the service.

title: Israel hacked Tehran's traffic cameras, used AI to kill Khamenei during Operation Rasing Lion - FT
description: A Financial Times report reveals Israel used hacked traffic cameras and AI to map Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei’s movements before his assassination. 30...

title: AI went from assistant to autonomous actor and security never caught up
description: Enterprise AI deployments have shifted from pilot programs to production systems handling customer data, executing business transactions, and integrating with core infrastructure. That has exposed a significant gap between what AI agents can do and what security teams can observe or control. A briefing published by the AIUC-1 Consortium, developed with input from Stanford’s Trustworthy AI Research Lab and more than 40 security executives, documents the security conditions that emerged in 2025 and projects the ... More →The post AI went from assistant to autonomous actor and security never caught up appeared first on Help Net Security.

title: How to use Google Gemini to generate your perfect Holi look? Check step-by-step guide with 35 AI prompts
description: Holi 2026 is here. If you want to join the celebrations with AI-generated images, here’s our step-by-step guide along with detailed prompts to help you get the best results

title: Podcasts and AI content amplify reputation risks for celebrities like Allu Arjun
description: Allu Arjun’s legal action spotlights how podcasts and social media can rapidly amplify reputational risks. Viral claims and AI-generated content can dent endorsements and contracts, forcing celebrities to adopt swift legal and management countermeasures.
